background.value: In the context of the rapid development of the current artificial intelligence field, especially with the continuous emergence of research on large language models (LLMs), writing a comprehensive literature review has become exceptionally challenging. AutoSurvey was created to address this issue; it leverages the powerful capabilities of large language models to quickly and efficiently generate high-quality literature reviews automatically.
background.evidence: 在当前人工智能领域快速发展的背景下，特别是大语言模型（LLM）的研究不断涌现，撰写全面的文献综述变得异常困难。AutoSurvey 正是为了解决这一问题而诞生，它利用大语言模型的强大能力，快速、高效地自动生成高质量的文献综述。

information_explosion.value: The amount of information is vast and complex: With the rapid development of the field of artificial intelligence, the number of research papers has exploded. In just the first four months of 2024, over 4,000 papers related to "large language models" were submitted to arXiv, making it difficult for researchers to fully grasp the latest advancements.
information_explosion.evidence: 信息量庞大且复杂： 随着人工智能领域的飞速发展，研究论文数量呈现爆炸式增长。仅在2024年前四个月，arXiv上就提交了超过4000篇涉及"大语言模型"的论文，这让研究人员难以全面了解最新进展。

context_window_limitations.value: Context window limitations: Large language models have context window limitations when processing long documents. Although some advanced models (such as GPT-4 and Claude 3) support inputs exceeding 100k tokens, their outputs are still limited to within 8k tokens, which is particularly insufficient for tasks that require reviewing hundreds of papers.
context_window_limitations.evidence: 上下文窗口限制： 大语言模型在处理长文档时存在上下文窗口限制。尽管一些高级大模型（如GPT-4和Claude 3）支持超过100k tokens的输入，其输出仍限制在8k tokens以内，对于需要综述数百篇论文的任务来说，这显得尤为不足。

parameter_knowledge_constraints.value: Parameter knowledge constraints: Relying solely on the internal knowledge of large language models cannot produce a comprehensive and accurate overview. The model may generate content based on inaccurate or fictitious citations and cannot cover the latest research findings beyond the training data.
parameter_knowledge_constraints.evidence: 参数知识约束：仅依赖大语言模型的内部知识无法生成全面且准确的综述。模型可能会生成基于不准确或虚构引用的内容，且无法涵盖训练数据之外的最新研究成果。

lack_of_evaluation_benchmarks.value: Lack of evaluation benchmarks: Currently, there is a lack of reliable evaluation metrics to assess the quality of summaries generated by large language models. Manual review is not only resource-intensive but also difficult to scale, making it challenging to meet the high standards for accuracy and reliability in academia.
lack_of_evaluation_benchmarks.evidence: 缺乏评估基准：目前缺乏可靠的评估指标来评估大语言模型生成的综述质量。人工审查不仅耗费资源且难以扩展，难以满足学术界对综述准确性和可靠性的高标准。

logical_parallel_generation.value: Logical parallel generation: AutoSurvey employs a two-stage generation method to efficiently produce review content. First, multiple large language models generate detailed outlines in parallel, from which a comprehensive framework is synthesized. Next, each subsection of the review is generated in parallel, guided by the outline, significantly accelerating the generation speed. After generation, each part undergoes thorough revision and polishing to ensure consistency and coherence of the content.
logical_parallel_generation.evidence: 逻辑并行生成：AutoSurvey 采用两阶段生成方法高效生成综述内容。首先，多个大语言模型并行生成详细大纲，并从中综合出最终的全面框架。接着，每个综述的子部分并行生成，并根据大纲进行指导，大大加快了生成速度。生成后，每个部分都会经过详细修订和润色，以确保内容的一致性和连贯性。

real_time_knowledge_update.value: Real-time knowledge updates: AutoSurvey uses a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) method, integrating a real-time knowledge update mechanism to improve the accuracy of citations in the review. RAG is based on a database of over 520,000 computer science papers published on arXiv (see https://github.com/AutoSurveys/AutoSurvey).
real_time_knowledge_update.evidence: 实时知识更新：AutoSurvey 使用检索增强生成（RAG）方法，集成实时知识更新机制，提高了综述在引用上的准确性。RAG基于收集的超52万篇发表在arxiv上的计算机论文数据库（见https://github.com/AutoSurveys/AutoSurvey）。

multi_llm_evaluation.value: Large Language Model Review: AutoSurvey adopts a large language model review strategy, utilizing multiple large language models to generate preliminary evaluation metrics, which are then refined by human experts to minimize bias and ensure the comprehensiveness and balance of the assessment, in accordance with strict academic standards.
multi_llm_evaluation.evidence: 多大语言模型评审：AutoSurvey 采用多大语言模型评审策略，利用多个大语言模型生成初步评估指标，再由人类专家进一步细化，最小化偏差，确保评估的全面性和均衡性，符合严格的学术标准。

initial_retrieval_outline_generation.value: Initial search and outline generation: Search for relevant literature based on the review topic and generate a structured outline from the retrieved literature.
initial_retrieval_outline_generation.evidence: 初始检索和大纲生成： 根据综述主题检索相关文献，并从检索到的文献中生成结构化的大纲。

subsection_drafting.value: Drafting of subsections: Each part of the parallel drafting outline utilizes large language models to extract the latest relevant research findings.
subsection_drafting.evidence: 子部分起草： 并行起草大纲的每个部分，利用大语言模型提取最新相关研究成果。

integration_refinement.value: Integration and refinement: revise each section to improve consistency and coherence, ultimately merging into a cohesive document.
integration_refinement.evidence: 集成和完善：修订每个部分以提高一致性和连贯性，最终合并成一个连贯的文档。

rigorous_evaluation_iteration.value: Rigorous evaluation and iteration: Using large language model review methods to assess the citation quality and content quality of reviews, selecting the best review through iteration.
rigorous_evaluation_iteration.evidence: 严格评估和迭代：采用多大语言模型评审方法评估综述的引用质量和内容质量，通过迭代选择最佳综述。

experiment_setup.value: Extensive experiments with various lengths of summaries (8k, 16k, 32k, and 64k tokens) have shown that AutoSurvey consistently performs excellently in terms of citation quality and content quality, even approaching human levels at the longest summary lengths.
experiment_setup.evidence: 通过不同长度综述（8k、16k、32k和64k tokens）的大量实验表明，AutoSurvey 在引用质量和内容质量上始终表现出色，甚至在最长的综述长度下也接近人类水平。

citation_quality_results.value: Citation quality: With 64k tokens, AutoSurvey achieved a recall rate of 82.25% and a precision of 77.41%, outperforming LLMs based on simple RAG (68.79% recall rate and 61.97% precision), and approaching human performance (86.33% recall rate and 77.78% precision).
citation_quality_results.evidence: 引用质量：在64k tokens下，AutoSurvey在引用质量上的召回率达82.25%，精确度为77.41%，优于基于简单RAG的LLMs（68.79%召回率和61.97%精确度），并接近人类表现（86.33%召回率和77.78%精确度）。

content_quality_results.value: Content Quality: With 64k tokens, AutoSurvey achieved scores of 4.73, 4.33, and 4.86 in coverage, structure, and relevance, respectively, approaching human performance.
content_quality_results.evidence: 内容质量：在64k tokens下，AutoSurvey在覆盖率、结构和相关性方面的评分分别为4.73、4.33和4.86，接近人类表现。

performance_analysis.value: These results validate the effectiveness of the scoring mechanism of AutoSurvey's large language model, providing a reliable proxy to replace human judgment for generating summaries of varying lengths.
performance_analysis.evidence: 这些结果验证了AutoSurvey的多大语言模型评分机制的有效性，提供了一个可靠的代理来代替人类判断，适用于不同长度的综述生成。

conclusion.value: AutoSurvey is the first system to explore the use of large model agents for writing large-scale academic reviews. It provides a solution to the literature review problem that balances efficiency and quality, helping researchers quickly understand the latest research developments.
conclusion.evidence: AutoSurvey 是第一个探索利用大型模型代理撰写大规模学术综述的系统。它为文献综述问题提供了一种兼顾效率与质量的解决方案，帮助研究人员快速了解到最新研究动态。
